title: 14 to 16-year-old pupil premium and free meals data return 2025 to 2026: guidance for completing the form
body: "This guidance explains how to access and complete the form used to report the number of 14 to 16-year-old students in your institution eligible for free meals, pupil premium, and service pupil premium in the 2025 to 2026 academic year.  "
